violations.description: API suite is 248 lines and mixes four behavioral concerns in one file.
violations.suggestion: Split into focused case modules (placement, lifecycle, closed-thread fallback).
violations.code_snippet: test.describe('Story ux-r3 Voicemail and Indicator Behavior (ATDD API RED)', () => { ... })

violations.description: E2E suite is 163 lines and combines multiple flows that can be modularized.
violations.suggestion: Split E2E scenarios into smaller files by acceptance criterion.
violations.code_snippet: test.describe('Story ux-r3 Voicemail and Indicator Behavior (ATDD E2E RED)', () => { ... })

violations.description: Webhook POST setup pattern is repeated with small payload variations.
violations.suggestion: Extract helper for inbound webhook invocation and expected envelope assertions.

violations.description: Cases include priority tags but no stable story/test IDs in title prefix.
violations.suggestion: Adopt stable IDs (e.g., UX-R3-API-001) for traceability in reports.
violations.code_snippet: '[P0] voicemail on claimed threads remains in Mine ... @P0'

recommendations: Modularize ux-r3 API and E2E suites by acceptance criterion.
Introduce shared webhook/assertion helpers to cut repetition.
Add stable case IDs to improve CI and defect traceability.
summary: Maintainability is moderate; structure and reuse can be improved significantly.
